name: Region Nordjylland (North Denmark Region)

colors.symbolism: the deep red of the regional logo, evoking the Danish flag and the region's identity

description: A deep red field charged at the centre with the white wordmark logo 'Region Nordjylland'.
history: Region Nordjylland was created on 1 January 2007 by the Danish Local Government Reform (Strukturreformen), which dissolved the previous counties and replaced them with five regions. The flag uses the region's official red-and-white visual identity.

features.symbolism: the official wordmark of Region Nordjylland (the North Denmark Region), one of the five administrative regions established in the 2007 local-government reform
